title: Row and Column Widgets in Flutter
content:
### Row and Column

`Row` and `Column` are flex widgets that lay out children in horizontal and vertical arrays respectively.

```dart
// Row: horizontal layout
Row(
  mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceEvenly,
  crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.center,
  children: [
    Icon(Icons.star),
    Icon(Icons.favorite),
    Icon(Icons.home),
  ],
)

// Column: vertical layout
Column(
  mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
  crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  children: [
    const Text('Title'),
    const Text('Subtitle'),
    ElevatedButton(onPressed: () {}, child: const Text('Action')),
  ],
)
```

### MainAxisAlignment

| Value | Row | Column |
|-------|-----|--------|
| `start` | Left | Top |
| `center` | Center | Center |
| `end` | Right | Bottom |
| `spaceBetween` | Space between children | Same |
| `spaceAround` | Equal space around | Same |
| `spaceEvenly` | Equal space all | Same |

### CrossAxisAlignment

| Value | Row | Column |
|-------|-----|--------|
| `start` | Top | Left |
| `center` | Center | Center |
| `end` | Bottom | Right |
| `stretch` | Stretch height | Stretch width |
| `baseline` | Text baseline | Text baseline |

### Expanded and Flexible

```dart
Row(
  children: [
    Expanded(
      flex: 2,
      child: Container(color: Colors.red),
    ),
    Expanded(
      flex: 1,
      child: Container(color: Colors.blue),
    ),
    Container(
      width: 100,
      color: Colors.green,
    ),
  ],
)
```

### Spacer

```dart
Row(
  children: [
    const Text('Left'),
    const Spacer(), // Pushes to right
    const Text('Right'),
  ],
)

Column(
  children: [
    const Text('Top'),
    const Spacer(), // Pushes to bottom
    const Text('Bottom'),
  ],
)
```

> **Key Point:** Use `Expanded` to fill available space proportionally. Use `Spacer` to add flexible empty space. Use `mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min` to shrink-wrap content.

quiz.question: Which property distributes space along the main axis?
Which widget fills available space proportionally?
